name: Clara Pipeline A - Demo to v1 Agent

parameters.content:
## Clara Pipeline A: Demo Call → v1 Agent

**Flow:** Manual Trigger → Config → Read transcript → Ollama LLM extraction → Parse & validate → Generate Agent Spec → Save outputs

**To run:** Edit "1. Configuration" node with your transcript path, then click Execute Workflow.

**Ollama URL:** Uses `host.docker.internal` to reach Ollama running on your Mac.
